introSection: Master Thai is a steel roller coaster located at Mirabilandia in Savio, Emilia-Romagna, Italy.

sections.title: History
sections.content: The attraction opened on 5 August 2011. In 2017, virtual reality headsets were added to the ride.

fullText:
Master Thai is a steel roller coaster located at Mirabilandia in Savio, Emilia-Romagna, Italy.

The attraction opened on 5 August 2011. In 2017, virtual reality headsets were added to the ride.
